vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

risk.desc: The base plate may not have sufficient strength to support the harmonic drive and arm weight.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and consider reinforcing the base plate if necessary.

risk.desc: Leveling feet may not provide adequate stability for the base joint.
risk.mit: Include a leveling sensor and adjust the leveling feet design if needed.

risk.desc: Cable harness routing may cause strain on the cables, leading to premature failure.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief channels and ensure cables follow the stated minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: The inspection window may not provide sufficient access for visual inspection.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the inspection window or add additional access points.

risk.desc: The harmonic drive mounting may not be robust enough to handle peak torque.
risk.mit: Conduct torque testing and reinforce the mounting if necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

physics_paths.path_description: Signal cables from base to wrist, routed through the cable spine with strain relief at each joint.
Cooling air flow path through the cable spine, with openings at each joint for heat dissipation.
Pneumatic lines from base to wrist, routed through the cable spine with strain relief at each joint.
Service access path through the cable spine, with inspection windows at each joint.

internal_feature_targets.feature_description: Main cable spine channel from base to wrist.
Slack loop at each joint for cable management.
Strain relief grommet at each cable entry/exit point.
Clip to secure cables within the spine.
Inspection window for visual access to cables.
Pneumatic line channel within the spine.
Signal cable routing through the spine.
Fastener pattern for mounting the spine.

integration_opportunities.opportunity_description: Ensure cable spine remains accessible for inspection and maintenance.
Design for easy replacement of cable spine without full teardown.
Provide clear access to connectors and cables.

verification_focus.focus_description: Ensure assembly order is feasible and parts remain accessible.
Verify load path closure and appropriate connection types.

generated_parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
generated_parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

requirements: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6
fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels
Replaceable motor modules per joint with fastener access
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
J1-J6 axis rings, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, and tool flange datum are visible
Each joint shows a bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature, shaft locating geometry, and stated fit intent for inner/outer races
Harness crossing each joint has slack loop, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range
